description: Recto: Letter addressed to a sister. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: late, probably no earlier than 14th century. May mention a man beating a woman (three lines from the bottom). Verso: Letter in a different hand. In Judaeo-Arabic with some Hebrew. Narrates a distressing event, mentions something a woman said to somebody, and asks the addressee to appease  someone. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
